events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May turns 79. Still rocking stages worldwide, his iconic sound continues to inspire.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: The inimitable frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday. Still commanding stages with unparalleled energy, a true rock 'n' roll legend.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV launched, forever changing music with its first video: The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' It truly did, for a while!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago. From Manchester to the world, it defined a generation.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment that defined a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977; he was born in 1935.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year. His legacy continues to shake, rattle, and roll.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur passed away on September 1, 1996; he was born in 1971.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years since the passing of Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and enduring influence on hip-hop culture remain as relevant as ever.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970; he was born in 1942.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled guitar virtuoso, Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His innovative sound continues to shape music.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released 57 years ago. That zebra crossing became one of music's most famous images.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the trailblazing Chrissie Hynde of The Pretenders. Her distinctive voice and fierce rock spirit are as strong as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher turns 54 today. Still bringing that unmistakable swagger and voice to the world of rock and roll.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released 55 years ago. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple announced the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and revolutionising how we listen to music.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since Dr. No premiered and introduced the world to 007's iconic style and adventure.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His profound impact on music and culture remains undiminished.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary comedic genius, John Cleese. From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his wit is timeless.
